description: The Rebels Motorcycle Club was an outlaw motorcycle club based in Western Canada, founded in Red Deer, Alberta in 1968. It was one of the dominant motorcycle clubs in Alberta during the 1970s-1990s, with chapters in Edmonton, Calgary, Moose Jaw, Saskatoon, and Toronto. The club engaged in violent conflicts with rivals such as the Grim Reapers and the Canadian Airborne Regiment. It was active until 2004.
